31.reason: [sscanf returns the number of items matched, not EOF on success; it returns EOF only on input failure before any conversion. This condition may not work correctly.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.25 , reason:  [sscanf returns the number of items matched, not EOF on success; it returns EOF only on input failure before any conversion. This condition may not work correctly.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.25 , reason:  sscanf returns the number of items matched, not EOF; should check for 2 or use != 2 to detect failure.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  The condition should be `==2` (or `>0`) instead of `!=EOF`. sscanf returns the number of successfully matched items; it does not return EOF on failure for a string, causing an infinite loop.

17.reason: This comparison does not handle equal exponents correctly; it returns -1 even when equal, violating the strict weak ordering required by qsort. It should return 0 for equality.
